opening_line: Hi - I read a review where Aiden mentioned tidy finishes on a job with West Park Electrics. That stood out.
source_quote: My father was an electrician and he was planning to fit a cooker for my nan, unfortunately he passed away. I rang Choudhary and he got it done, the man is a saint and understood what my nan was going through and did not charge! The whole family will be praying for you Choudhary! She will definitely
why_this_angle: Lead with review detail about tidy finishes (Aiden)
suggested_whatsapp: Hi, Julius here. I build websites for local trades. One of your Google reviews from Aiden mentioned tidy finishes - I mocked up a one-page site around that. No obligation - want a quick look?

follow_up_replies.text: One-page site from £300. Includes mobile layout and quote form.
No problem - I will remove the preview. Thanks for your time.
